description: Maps thematic indicator panels (theme_panel_config.json) to holdings whose optionality they help explain. Used by apply_context_overlay.py to inject context_overlay into valuation.json. Context only: never a base-IRR input.

ai_power_land.rationale: AI compute demand -> power/grid/water constraint -> scarce Permian surface and Southwest renewable hosting. Hyperscaler capex is the upstream pulse; power and gas prices are midstream signals. AZLCZ Southwest renewable leases share the power-demand tailwind (geography differs from Permian).

macro_regime.rationale: Portfolio-wide risk appetite, rates, dollar, and credit impulse context for stance sizing.

gold_royalties.rationale: Gold spot and royalty-sentiment proxies for precious-metals royalty compounders.

exchange_volatility.rationale: Vol level and term-structure context for exchange croupiers and vol-sensitive platforms.

water_surface.rationale: Produced-water and surface royalties midstream of oil and land scarcity.

btc_hash_power.rationale: Hashpower and power arbitrage; overlaps AI hosting sites.

energy_royalty.rationale: Oil and gas royalty trusts and mineral streams.

index_data_fees.rationale: Index, ratings, and market-data fee platforms.

pharma_royalty.rationale: Pharma royalty and durable drug cash.

nuclear_power.rationale: Nuclear/SMR firm power for AI and grid load.
